{{CargoRelic
|name=Bharata Postcard
|class_id=20211
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=While scouting for info about the Demon God in Bharata, the snail also recorded a lot of local customs, which were brought together in this postcard. You can read it to kill time and post it online to get many likes!
|fame=17
|art=30
|fth=10
|civ=16
|tech=17
|ss1=Bharata Museum Medal Output +5
|ss2=Bharata Museum Medal Output +10
|ss3=Bharata Museum Medal Output +15
|ss4=Bharata Museum Medal Output +15
|ss7=Bharata Museum Medal Output +15<br> (Awakened)
}}
